content: agent2: implementing graded relevance support in NDCG metric, file: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/evaluation/retrieval/metrics.py (NDCG class). Will only touch NDCG-related code there.

agent2: done with NDCG.compute — added optional relevance_scores: Dict[str, float] param. DCG uses a get_relevance(docid) helper; IDCG still uses ideal_length = min(len(retrieved_ids), len(expected_ids)) but when relevance_scores is given it sorts expected relevance values descending and takes the top ideal_length for the ideal ranking. If you change ideal_length to len(expected_ids) that's an independent fix on your end — just flagging that both of us touch the idcg block (~lines 374-406 now) so merges may need manual reconciliation.
